
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for Li2 w. bond length 4.4 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...
Built molecule Li2 with basis 6-31G and bond length 4.4 Angstrom.
Number of electrons: 6, Number of orbitals: 18
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 11 active virtual orbitals (out of 15 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -14.856433255406655 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.018738636967358866 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).

OVOS optimized energy = -15.940576 Hartree @ iterations 63.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...
UHF energy = -15.935713 Hartree @ iterations 71.

Calculating UMP2 natural orbitals for comparison...
UMP2 natural orbitals are restricted (RHF-like).
